title: US says needs $80 billion for Iran war, other bills: media

snapshot.title: US says needs $80 billion for Iran war, other bills: media
snapshot.description: WASHINGTON: The US Defense Department will ask Congress to approve around $80 billion to cover costs from the Iran war and other expenses, the Wall Street Journal reported Thursday.President Donald Trump has faced backlash from Americans who accuse him of pouring billions of taxpayer dollars into the Middle East conflict while oil prices and inflation skyrocket in the United
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: US says needs $80 billion for Iran war, other bills: media | Arab News
